officials.name: A. E. Eldridge
officials.allowances: 50l. as Federal Treasurer and fees as Registrar of Shipping

officials.name: W. Thompson
officials.allowances: in conjunction with that of Harbour Master, at 100l. and fees

officials.name: J. S. McDonald
officials.allowances: 36l. horse allowance, 40l. as Inspector of Weights and Measures, 14l. travelling expenses

officials.name: W. M. Mackison
officials.position: Colonial Engineer and Surveyor of Public Works, Roads, etc.

officials.name: T. Fisher
officials.allowances: 20l. for keeping Prison Accounts, 12l. in lieu of uniform, 20l. as Superintendent of Pauper Cemetery, and 50l. as Superintendent of Training School

officials.name: F. Maynard
officials.allowances: uniform, 3l., medical attendance, 1l., and quarters valued at 10l.

officials.name: Edward Bell
officials.allowances: house allowance, 40l., horse allowance, 35l., Adjutant Antigua Defence Force, 40l., and as Chief Inspector, 100l., and horse allowance, 20l.

officials.name: C. Brookes
officials.allowances: house allowance, 15l., and a personal allowance of 1l.

officials.name: O. Nugent
officials.position: Magistrate and Coroner (Barbuda); Supplementary Magistrate, Antigua; Deputy Coroner
officials.allowances: 50l.; 30l., and 30l. horse allowance; Escheator General, fees

officials.name: A. H. Kirkby
officials.position: Agricultural and Science Master, Grammar School

officials.name: J. E. James
officials.allowances: 25l. horse allowance, receives also 50l. by 5l. to 75l. as Clerk to Inspector of Schools

officials.name: F. L. Norris
officials.position: Chief Government Medical Officer and Medical Officer, District No. 2, also Health Officer

officials.name: W. J. Essex
officials.allowances: personal allowance, 10l., ration allowance, 40l., 16s., horse allowance, 24l., quarters valued at 25l

officials.name: W. J. Abbott
officials.position: City Clerk, Chief Inspector of Nuisances and Superintendent of Cemeteries

officials.name: G. C. Johnson
officials.position: Clerk, Private Secretary and Clerk of Councils

officials.name: L. M. Kortright
officials.position: Surveyor of Roads and Superintendent of Public Works; Protector of Forests

officials.name: C. C. Greaves
officials.position: Assistant Surveyor of Roads and Superintendent of Public Works; Clerk, Waterworks (Nevis)

officials.name: F. R. Shepherd
officials.position: Curator, Botanic Station (under Imperial Department of Agriculture)

officials.name: E. R. Branch
officials.allowances: fees and private practice in Basseterre
